prompt: Create a fisheye-lens close-up selfie of a cute anime schoolgirl sitting at a classroom desk, reaching one arm toward the camera as if taking the photo herself. The character has an oversized 3D anime doll-like head with glossy skin, a tiny open mouth, one eye winking and the other eye wide open with a vivid purple-blue starry iris and bright catchlights. She has bubblegum pink hair with thin pastel blue streaks, styled as a short wavy bob with long bangs covering part of one eye, a small side braid across the top, and shiny black star-shaped hair clips. Add black star earrings on the visible ear. She wears a white short-sleeve shirt, beige-and-black plaid vest, and dark red ribbon tie. Her left hand writes with a black pen in an open lined notebook on the desk, while a black textbook labeled BIOCHEMISTRY with a colorful periodic-table graphic sits beside it. The background is a realistic Japanese classroom with desks, papers, window blinds, fluorescent ceiling lights, warm indoor lighting, and a few blurred students in the distance; one background face is intentionally obscured. Use extreme wide-angle fisheye distortion with a dark circular vignette at the edges, strong foreground arm foreshortening, shallow depth of field, glossy high-detail anime rendering blended with realistic classroom photography, vibrant colors, soft blush, and cinematic highlights. Keep the composition vertical, intimate, playful, and slightly surreal; no extra text except the textbook cover.
